task_completion.description: Navigate to the Environments section in the TailwindTraders project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Azure DevOps web interface is open to the 'Environments' page under the 'Pipelines' menu within the 'TailwindTraders' project.
An environment named exactly 'Production' (case-sensitive) is visible in the environments list, or the specific details page for the 'Production' environment is open.

task_completion.description: Access the Approvals and checks settings for the Production environment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Approvals and checks' panel or tab is open specifically for the 'Production' environment.
The 'Approvals' option is selected from the list of available checks to add to the environment.
The 'TailwindTraders Team' is explicitly selected or entered in the 'Approvers' input field within the Approvals configuration pane.

task_completion.description: Add the required instructions for the approvers
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Verify changelog and smoke test results before approving.' is entered into the 'Instructions to approvers' text area within the Approvals configuration pane.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Azure DevOps GUI rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Azure DevOps portal, clicking buttons, and filling out web forms.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Azure DevOps application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface displays standard Azure DevOps navigation menus, headers, and styling, rather than a text editor or a static mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements, fonts, and layout appear consistent with standard Azure DevOps styling, and no browser developer console is open modifying the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project is 'TailwindTraders'. The environment must be named exactly 'Production' (case-sensitive). The approver must be set to 'TailwindTraders Team'. The instructions to approvers must be exactly: 'Verify changelog and smoke test results before approving.'
